name: SmartDine Foodcourt
tagline: All Your Favorites Under One Roof
description: Experience the best of multiple cuisines — from Indian street food to continental grills, all powered by AI ordering.
hero_quote: Every craving. Every cuisine. Every time.
history_intro: SmartDine Foodcourt brings together the best vendors and cuisines under one smart, AI-powered dining experience.

history.title: The Concept
history.description: SmartDine Foodcourt was born from a vision to revolutionize the foodcourt experience with AI.

history.title: Grand Opening
history.description: Opened with 12 food stalls covering 8 different cuisines.

why_us.title: 12+ Cuisines
why_us.description: From Indian to Italian, Chinese to Continental.

why_us.title: AI Ordering
why_us.description: Smart recommendations based on your mood.

why_us.title: Quick Service
why_us.description: Order from your seat, food comes to you.

why_us.title: Fresh Daily
why_us.description: Every stall prepares food fresh throughout the day.

why_us.title: Family Friendly
why_us.description: Kids play area and family seating available.

why_us.title: Zero Wait
why_us.description: AI manages kitchen queues for fastest delivery.

contact.address: 5 Food Court Avenue, Tech Park Mall

ai_waiter.name: SmartBot
ai_waiter.personality: Quick, fun, and knows every stall's specialty
ai_waiter.greeting: Hey there! Welcome to SmartDine Foodcourt. What are you craving today?

reviews.name: Rahul T.
reviews.text: The AI ordering is a game changer. No more standing in queues!

reviews.name: Sneha K.
reviews.text: Love the variety. My family can each order from different stalls.

offers.title: Combo Deal
offers.description: Order from 2+ stalls and get 15% off your total bill
